AxReportDesign.Name: PrecisionDesign1
AxReportDesign.Text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <Report xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/sqlserver/reporting/2016/01/reportdefinition" xmlns:rd="http://schemas.microsoft.com/SQLServer/reporting/reportdesigner"> <AutoRefresh>0</AutoRefresh> <DataSources> <DataSource Name="AutoGen__ReportDataProvider"> <Transaction>true</Transaction> <ConnectionProperties> <DataProvider>AXREPORTDATAPROVIDER</DataProvider> <ConnectString /> <IntegratedSecurity>true</IntegratedSecurity> </ConnectionProperties> <Value>=Parameters!AX_ReportContext.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_RdpPreProcessedId"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_RdpPreProcessedId.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="FromDate"> <Value>=Parameters!ETGVendTransGroupingDP_FromDate.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="ToDate"> <Value>=Parameters!ETGVendTransGroupingDP_ToDate.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> </QueryParameters> <CommandText>SELECT * FROM ETGVendTransGroupingDP.ETGVendTransGroupTmp</CommandText> <rd:UseGenericDesigner>true</rd:UseGenericDesigner> </Query> <Fields> <Field Name="AccountNum"> <DataField>ETGVendTransGroupTmp.1.AccountNum</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="AmountCredit">
